REGISTER NOW
AAAC 2026
General Overview

WHAT IS AAAC?

The All Africa Apostolic Congress (AAAC) is an annual convergence of church leaders, ministers and believers from across Africa and beyond. It is a gathering centred on advancing God's Kingdom through sound apostolic doctrine, worship, prayer, and leadership development.

Visionary Evolution

WHY WE TRANSITIONED FROM SOM TO AAAC

The transition from School of Ministry (SOM) to All Africa Apostolic Congress (AAAC) reflects the growth of both the vision and the scope of the gathering.

THE ORIGINAL SOM BASELINE

While SOM primarily focused on equipping individuals for ministry through teaching and training, the gathering has evolved into a broader platform that brings together believers, ministers, church leaders and apostolic voices from across Africa and beyond.

THE BROADER AAAC PLATFORM

The gathering has evolved into a broader platform that brings together believers, ministers, church leaders and apostolic voices from across Africa and beyond.

The Experience Blueprint

WHAT TO EXPECT AT AAAC 2026

Expect to leave with more than notes. Expect new perspectives, deeper convictions, meaningful relationships and a clearer understanding of God's work in our generation.

LEARNING

Acquire sound apostolic insights and clear structural understanding of spiritual coordinates in our generation.

WORSHIP

Engage in high-intensity corporate worship, aligning different nations and backgrounds in corporate adoration.

PRAYER

Raise combined inter-continental fire altars, shifting regional atmosphere models across African territory.

GROWTH

Build meaningful ministry expression relationships centered completely around a shared passion for His Kingdom.

Apostolic Alignment

MINISTERING VOICES

Pastor Olakunle Zakariya

Host

Pastor Olakunle Zakariya is the Founder and President of Glory Realms Ministries and the Senior Pastor of Glory Centre Community Church. An apostolic teacher with a passion for raising mature believers, he is committed to building healthy local churches, equipping leaders and advancing God's Kingdom across nations through sound biblical teaching and discipleship.

Pastor Adesola Zakariya

Senior Pastor

Pastor Adesola Zakariya serves as a Senior Pastor at the Glory Realms Ministries. She is deeply committed to discipleship, the unity of the Church and raising believers who reflect the life of Christ. Through her teaching ministry and leadership of Jesus Girls Ministry, she has devoted herself to nurturing lives grounded in biblical truth.

Pastor Zerubbabel Betta Mengistu

Guest Minister

Pastor Zerubbabel Betta Mengistu is an Ethiopian minister and Bible teacher with a passion for strengthening the Church through sound doctrine and Christ-centred leadership. His ministry is marked by a commitment to equipping believers, developing leaders and advancing God's Kingdom across Africa.

Apostle Brandon Bailey

Guest Minister

Apostle Brandon Bailey is the Founder and Senior Pastor of Teleios Church in Johannesburg, South Africa, and a leading voice in the Kingdom Impact Network. Known for his revelatory teaching and apostolic ministry, he is passionate about laying strong biblical foundations, maturing the Church and equipping believers to fulfil their Kingdom assignment.

Access Portals

SELECT YOUR EXPERIENCE PATHWAY

The doors are opened everyone for powerful worship, prayer and life-changing teaching. Sessions hold daily at 8:00 AM and 5:00 PM.

PREVIOUS ENCOUNTERS IN MOTION

Inquiries Portfolio

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

The All Africa Apostolic Congress is an annual convergence of church leaders, ministers and believers from across Africa and beyond, centred on advancing God's Kingdom through sound apostolic doctrine, worship, prayer, and leadership development.
While SOM primarily focused on equipping individuals for ministry through teaching and training, the gathering has evolved into a broader platform that brings together believers, ministers, church leaders and apostolic voices from across Africa and beyond.
Powerful structural sessions hold twice daily, running systematically at 8:00 AM and 5:00 PM across the 5-day layout period.
AAAC 2026 offers dual participation tracks: join us in person at Lagos, or tune in from anywhere globally via our virtual broadcast channels (YouTube and Mixlr).
The on-site platform location is situated directly at 28, Efon Alaye Street, Off Olajide Street, Ojodu Berger, Lagos, Nigeria.
We stream all execution tracks natively via the high-definition YouTube Live video dashboard alongside the Mixlr live audio framework.
Expect new perspectives, deeper convictions, meaningful relationships, fresh insights, and a clearer corporate understanding of God's work in our generation.

OF THE KINGDOM
